title: Naan Pogum Idamellam Lyrics Kadhal Kan Kattudhe
stanzas: <div>Naan Pogum Idamellam Lyrics Kadhal Kan Kattudhe Movie Song Lyrics

Naan pogum idamellam
serndhu vara koodaathaa
nee theadum nodi ellaam
paarthuvida koodaathaa

en kaigal korkkumpodhum
en tholil saayumpodhum
yedhedho ennam vandhu
unai kolluthaa

mai vaitha kangal ennai
ayyo thottu sella
minsaara minnal ondru
ennul vandhu sella

Ne endru sollumpodhum
naan endru sollumpodhum
naam endru kadhil
vandhu kaetkindrathaa

ariyaatha pillai pole
theriyaamal kangal rendum
thuppattaa thoongum
azhagai paarkindrathaa

natpendra peril unnai
naanum ottikolla
thappendru sollithandhu
paadam katrukkolla

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses the emotions of love and longing, reflecting on the complexities of relationships.

What is the plot context of the movie?

Kadhal Kan Kattudhe explores themes of love and connection, making this song a pivotal moment in the narrative.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Janani and Naresh Iyer.

Who is the music director for this song?

The music director is currently unknown.

When was the song released?

The song was released on February 11, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naan Pogum Idamellam, the protagonists express their deep feelings of love and the challenges that come with it. The song beautifully encapsulates the essence of romantic longing, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth. As part of the movie Kadhal Kan Kattudhe, it serves as a significant emotional anchor, resonating with anyone who has loved deeply.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naan Pogum Idamellam from Kadhal Kan Kattudhe is a beautifully crafted duet that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Janani and Naresh Iyer, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. Dive into the melodic journey that perfectly blends heartfelt lyrics with soothing melodies.
stanzaMeanings: Don't come looking for me wherever I go, don't look at everything you see.
The heat of the pearl is felt in the heart, isn't it?
Isn't our love something we should talk about?
Don't come looking for me wherever I go.
When you leave, do you stand alone, or does the work stop?
When my hands reach out, when my shoulders drop, does something come to take you away?
The eyes that are closed like a child, without knowing, both are sleeping, looking at the beautiful face.
You have taken me lightly, and done something.
When you say 'you', and I say 'I', our love comes and asks us.
Like a child who doesn't know, both eyes are closed, looking at the beautiful face.
In the name of love, I will learn to sing, saying I will take you along.
You have taken me lightly, and done something.
